task_completion.description: Log in to Moodle as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle dashboard or site home is visible with the user profile indicating the 'admin' user is logged in.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course page for 'Introduction to Biology' (or BIO101) is displayed in the browser.
The 'Import' tab or page within the Moodle Gradebook setup is visible.
The file 'lab_scores.csv' is shown as selected or uploaded in the file picker area of the CSV import page.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV columns to the correct Moodle fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The import mapping page shows 'Student Email' mapped to 'Email address' (Identify by) and 'Practical Result' mapped to 'Lab Practical 1' (Grade item mappings).

task_completion.description: Complete the import and verify the grades in the Grader report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Grader report shows the 'Lab Practical 1' column with the imported grades: 85.00 for jsmith, 92.00 for mjones, and 78.00 for awilson.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the Moodle site.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the Moodle UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing database injection (mysql/psql) or API requests (curl) to update the grades.

integrity.description: The final grades are displayed in the genuine Moodle Grader report interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the actual Moodle Grader report UI, not a text editor, spreadsheet application, or a manipulated local HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course shortname: BIO101. Grade item name: 'Lab Practical 1'. CSV path: '/home/ga/Documents/lab_scores.csv'. Expected grades in the Grader report: jsmith@example.com = 85.0, mjones@example.com = 92.0, awilson@example.com = 78.0.
